_doc: Exported from Supabase. Do not edit — run npm run macro:export to regenerate.

archetypes.name: Fire Keeper
archetypes.spriteNotes: Older figure, seated or crouching pose. Poking fire with a stick. Weathered face, calm expression.

archetypes.name: Settlement Chief
archetypes.spriteNotes: Strong, upright posture. Arms crossed or hand on hip. Confident expression. Middle-aged to older.

archetypes.name: Hearthkeeper
archetypes.spriteNotes: Carrying a pot or ladle. Sturdy build. Busy, purposeful stance.

archetypes.name: Market Master
archetypes.spriteNotes: Holds a ledger or counting board. Sharp-eyed, evaluating expression. Ink-stained fingers.

archetypes.name: Market Vendor
archetypes.spriteNotes: Standing behind a counter gesture. Varied body types. Some holding produce, cloth, or tools.

archetypes.name: Magistrate
archetypes.spriteNotes: Formal upright posture. Holds a scroll or seal. Clean-shaven or neatly groomed. Air of authority.

archetypes.name: Town Clerk
archetypes.spriteNotes: Slim build. Carries quill and ink. Slightly hunched from desk work. Squinting expression.

archetypes.name: Water Carrier
archetypes.spriteNotes: Carrying two buckets on a yoke across shoulders. Lean, strong build.

archetypes.name: Settler
archetypes.spriteNotes: Rugged, tired look. Carrying a bundle or tools. Recently arrived — clothes a bit worn.

archetypes.name: Villager
archetypes.spriteNotes: Varied — some carrying baskets, some idle, some with children. Mix of ages and body types.

archetypes.name: Townsperson
archetypes.spriteNotes: Better-kept than villagers. Upright posture. Some carrying goods, some walking purposefully.

archetypes.name: Landowner
archetypes.spriteNotes: Well-fed, confident stance. Hands clasped behind back or resting on belt. Proud bearing.

archetypes.name: House Servant
archetypes.spriteNotes: Neat but plain. Carrying a tray, broom, or folded cloth. Attentive posture, eyes down.

archetypes.name: Labourer
archetypes.spriteNotes: Strong, rough-handed. Some stretching, some carrying heavy loads. Work-worn clothes.

archetypes.name: Farmer
archetypes.spriteNotes: Holding a hoe, sickle, or sheaf of grain. Sun-weathered skin. Sturdy, grounded stance.

archetypes.name: Innkeeper
archetypes.spriteNotes: Broad, welcoming build. Wiping hands on apron. Warm expression. Slightly flushed cheeks.

archetypes.name: Traveller
archetypes.spriteNotes: Dusty road-worn clothes. Carrying a pack or bedroll. Mix of races — travellers come from everywhere.

archetypes.name: Barkeep
archetypes.spriteNotes: Stocky, thick arms from pouring and lifting. Holding a mug or cloth. Knowing smirk.

archetypes.name: Bard
archetypes.spriteNotes: Slim, expressive hands. Holding a stringed instrument or drum. More colourful than the locals — stands out.

archetypes.name: Peddler
archetypes.spriteNotes: Animated, gesturing pose. Surrounded by small wares. Quick eyes, ready smile.

archetypes.name: Stockmaster
archetypes.spriteNotes: Holding a tally stick or manifest. Practical, no-nonsense expression. Keys at belt.

archetypes.name: Dockhand
archetypes.spriteNotes: Heavy shoulders, strong arms. Carrying crates or barrels. Sleeves rolled up.

archetypes.name: Stablehand
archetypes.spriteNotes: Hay in hair, mucked boots. Holding a brush or feed bucket. Smells like horses but doesn't mind.

archetypes.name: Caravan Master
archetypes.spriteNotes: Weathered from travel. Stands with authority. Maps or route-sticks tucked in belt. Watchful eyes.

archetypes.name: Caravan Guard
archetypes.spriteNotes: Armed but relaxed — off-duty posture. Leaning on weapon or sitting. Scarred and sun-dark.

archetypes.name: Sawyer
archetypes.spriteNotes: Muscular arms and shoulders. Sawdust in hair and clothes. Holding a two-man saw or axe.

archetypes.name: Blacksmith
archetypes.spriteNotes: Barrel-chested, massive forearms. Holding tongs or hammer. Soot-marked face. Burn scars on arms.

archetypes.name: Apprentice Smith
archetypes.spriteNotes: Younger, thinner. Working bellows or sorting metal. Eager expression, smudged face.

archetypes.name: Smelter Worker
archetypes.spriteNotes: Heat-reddened skin. Heavy gloves. Pouring stance or carrying crucible. Squinting against glare.

archetypes.name: Miner
archetypes.spriteNotes: Dust-covered, hunched from tunnel work. Carrying pickaxe or ore basket. Headlamp or candle-hat.

archetypes.name: Mine Foreman
archetypes.spriteNotes: Stands at the entrance, not inside. Holds a lantern and tally board. Commanding posture.

archetypes.name: Smoker
archetypes.spriteNotes: Smells like woodsmoke. Hanging fish or meat on racks. Methodical, patient demeanour.

archetypes.name: Fisher
archetypes.spriteNotes: Lean, wiry build. Holding a net, line, or catch. Salt-weathered skin. Bare feet or wading boots.

archetypes.name: Net Mender
archetypes.spriteNotes: Seated, working on a net spread across lap. Nimble fingers. Often elderly.

archetypes.name: Tanner
archetypes.spriteNotes: Stained hands and apron. Working stretched hides. Strong chemical smell implied — others keep distance.

archetypes.name: Potter
archetypes.spriteNotes: Clay-dusted hands and forearms. Carrying a finished pot or working clay. Focused, careful expression.

archetypes.name: Miller
archetypes.spriteNotes: Flour-dusted from head to toe. Carrying grain sacks. Perpetually white-haired from flour regardless of age.

archetypes.name: Brewer
archetypes.spriteNotes: Ruddy-cheeked, stout build. Holding a barrel tap or tasting cup. Satisfied expression. Hop-stained hands.

archetypes.name: Craftsperson
archetypes.spriteNotes: Generic skilled worker — type depends on culture. Holding tools of trade. Concentrated expression.

archetypes.name: Lumber Worker
archetypes.spriteNotes: Tall, broad. Carrying logs or stacking planks. Bark chips in clothing. Axe always nearby.

archetypes.name: Salt Worker
archetypes.spriteNotes: Cracked dry hands, squinting eyes. White salt crust on boots and hem. Carrying salt baskets or raking pans.

archetypes.name: Granary Keeper
archetypes.spriteNotes: Watchful, protective stance near the door. Carrying a measuring scoop. Takes the job seriously — grain is life.

archetypes.name: Herder
archetypes.spriteNotes: Holding a crook or lead rope. Mud-splashed boots. Patient, slow-moving demeanour.

archetypes.name: Lookout
archetypes.spriteNotes: Standing tall, shielding eyes to scan horizon. Light armour. Alert, tense posture.

archetypes.name: Gate Guard
archetypes.spriteNotes: Standing at attention with spear or halberd. Stern expression. Blocks the way until satisfied.

archetypes.name: Soldier
archetypes.spriteNotes: Mix of on-duty (armed, armoured) and off-duty (eating, resting, sparring). Varied builds.

archetypes.name: Sergeant
archetypes.spriteNotes: Slightly better armour. Commanding posture. Arms folded or gesturing orders. Louder than necessary.

archetypes.name: Armourer
archetypes.spriteNotes: Inspecting a blade or fitting armour pieces. Precise, methodical hands. More craftsman than fighter.

archetypes.name: Guard
archetypes.spriteNotes: Relaxed patrol stance. Weapon at side, not raised. Knows the locals — nods to passersby.

archetypes.name: Drill Master
archetypes.spriteNotes: Older, scarred veteran. Shouting pose or demonstrating a stance. Muscular but greying.

archetypes.name: Recruit
archetypes.spriteNotes: Young, uncertain stance. Holding weapon awkwardly. Bruised. Mix of eager and terrified.

archetypes.name: Shrine Keeper
archetypes.spriteNotes: Quiet, contemplative pose. Tending offerings or sweeping. Gentle expression. Often elderly.

archetypes.name: Priest
archetypes.spriteNotes: Upright, formal posture. Hands together or holding a sacred object. Serene or stern depending on culture.

archetypes.name: Acolyte
archetypes.spriteNotes: Young, reverent expression. Carrying candles, incense, or ritual implements. Following the priest.

archetypes.name: Pilgrim
archetypes.spriteNotes: Travel-worn but purposeful. Carrying a staff and small pack. Mix of races — pilgrims come from afar. Hopeful or exhausted expression.

archetypes.name: Grove Tender
archetypes.spriteNotes: Kneeling or touching a tree. Plant matter woven into hair. Barefoot. Speaks softly, moves slowly.

archetypes.name: Gravedigger
archetypes.spriteNotes: Leaning on a shovel. Dirt under nails. Quiet, unbothered demeanour. Surprisingly good-humoured.

archetypes.name: Bridge Warden
archetypes.spriteNotes: Only in tier 3+. Collecting toll or checking papers. Bored but firm.

archetypes.name: Customs Officer
archetypes.spriteNotes: Holding a ledger, inspecting cargo. Suspicious expression. Ink-stained hands.

archetypes.name: Harbour Master
archetypes.spriteNotes: Watching ships. Holds a manifest or telescope. Weathered, commanding presence.

archetypes.name: Docker
archetypes.spriteNotes: Hauling ropes, carrying crates. Strong arms, bare forearms. Moving fast — ships don't wait.

archetypes.name: Boat Builder
archetypes.spriteNotes: Working on an upturned hull. Holding a plane or caulking iron. Wood shavings everywhere.

archetypes.name: Retired Hero
archetypes.spriteNotes: Old but formidable. One visible old wound or missing limb. Weapon mounted on the wall behind them. Eyes that have seen too much.

archetypes.name: Mage
archetypes.spriteNotes: Tall, thin. Crackling energy or faint glow around hands. Distracted expression — thinking about something else. Ink or chalk on fingers.

archetypes.name: Ruin Scavenger
archetypes.spriteNotes: Cautious posture. Carrying salvaged artefacts wrapped in cloth. Nervous eyes. Dust-covered.

archetypes.name: Relic Watcher
archetypes.spriteNotes: Sitting near the relic, keeping vigil. Obsessed expression. Muttering. Locals think they're odd.

archetypes.name: Refugee
archetypes.spriteNotes: Mixed races and clothing styles — not from here. Carrying bundles of possessions. Exhausted, wary. Children clinging to adults.

archetypes.name: Shrine Devotee
archetypes.spriteNotes: Kneeling in prayer or trance. Unusual markings on skin. Other locals avoid eye contact with them.

archetypes.name: Tinkerer
archetypes.spriteNotes: Goggles, oil-stained hands. Poking at a mechanism with tools. Excited, manic energy. Talking to the machine.

ambientArchetypes.name: Child
ambientArchetypes.spriteNotes: Small, running or playing. Chasing each other, throwing stones at a post, or sitting and drawing in dirt. Carefree.

ambientArchetypes.name: Elder
ambientArchetypes.spriteNotes: Slow-walking, sitting on a bench, or watching from a doorway. Weathered face. Observing everything, saying little.

ambientArchetypes.name: Wanderer
ambientArchetypes.spriteNotes: Passing through — different culture's clothing than the locals. Carrying a pack. Looking around, slightly lost.

ambientArchetypes.name: Stray Dog
ambientArchetypes.spriteNotes: Not a humanoid — small four-legged sprite. Scrappy, friendly. Following villagers or sleeping in the sun.
